arts.ttl: Is Tottenham vs Liverpool on ITV? Carabao Cup semi-final TV details explained
arts.sum: The latest Liverpool news as Arne Slot's team take on Tottenham Hotspur in the first leg of the Carabao Cup semi-final on Wednesday night

arts.ttl: Report: Aston Villa now expected to sign Tottenham target within days after agreeing £7.5m salary package
Tottenham vs Liverpool - Carabao Cup semi-final: Live score, team news and updates as out of form hosts look to take lead to Anfield against title holders
arts.sum: Follow Mail Sport's live blog for the latest score, team news and updates as Tottenham host Liverpool at the Tottenham Hotspur Stadium in the Carabao Cup semi-final first leg.

arts.ttl: Liverpool 'are considering move to sign Bayern Munich star who will be a free agent in the summer' - as the Premier League leaders look to strengthen Arne Slot's squad
arts.sum: Ryan Gravenberch has been transformed into the deepest-lying midfielder in the Dutchman's system, with the 22-year-old subsequently shining as one of Liverpool's stars of the campaign.

arts.ttl: Tottenham vs Liverpool Carabao Cup semi-final clash predicted with four goals scored
arts.sum: Since the defeat to Liverpool, the Lilywhites have failed to win a game, but Spurs will be looking to avoid a fifth game without a win and get off to a perfect start in the Carabao Cup semis when they welcome the Reds to the Tottenham Hotspur Stadium. After a thrilling 4-3 win over Manchester United in the Carabao Cup quarter-finals, Liverpool were arguably the last team that Spurs wanted to draw for the semi-finals, and that was proven just days later when the Reds beat Ange Postecoglou's side 6-3 in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Johan Lange given further Tottenham transfer instruction after £12.5m Antonin Kinsky deal
arts.sum: In regards to how many signings Tottenham need to make in the January transfer window, two to three new additions was the preferred choice with 46 per cent of votes. However, 38 per cent of Spurs fans believe that more needs to be done in the winter market as they opted for either four or five signings.

arts.ttl: Liverpool injuries: Every player out for semi-final clash with Tottenham
arts.sum: The versatile Gomez had replaced Konate in the starting lineup during his absence but sustained a hamstring injury in the 5-0 win over West Ham United in Liverpool's final game of 2024. Ibrahima Konate's return from injury was celebrated at the weekend, with the French defender making his comeback against Man Utd after five weeks in the treatment room.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou: Even Mohamed Salah would struggle at Tottenham
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur manager Ange Postecoglou has backed under-fire forward Son Heung-min to rediscover his best form soon, insisting even Mohamed Salah would struggle in the team's current injury crisis. The winger has five goals and six assists in 17 games, with Spurs struggling down in 12th in the Premier League standings .

arts.ttl: Tottenham vs Liverpool LIVE: Team news, line-ups and latest updates from Carabao Cup semi-final
arts.sum: Spurs are in desperate need of a win but face a difficult opponent when they welcome the Premier League leaders

arts.ttl: Tottenham 'Make Approach' to Sign 'Unbelievable' Defender who Wants to Join
arts.sum: Borussia Monchengladbach defender Ko Itakura is open to joining Tottenham Hotspur after receiving an approach from the North London club.
